channel.title: Posts on Rhys McQueen
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Rhys McQueen

item.title: My HomeLab 2022
item.description: My HomeLab This is my homelab that I have built together to help learn new and fun technologys in the IT space. I have learned many technologies using this lab including HA Hypervisors (Proxmox) Kubernetes, Docker Infrastructure as code (Terraform, Ansible) Reverse Proxies Power managment (2 x UPS’) Cable Managment Networking (Juniper 48P Poe 10gb Switch) IAAC Details: I have my rack tucked away insite a closed in the basement.
